title: Heavy Duty Mortar and Pestle Set with Bamboo Base, 100% Natural Granite Mortar and Pestle Small Stone Grinder Bowl, Molcajete Bowl, Masher Guacamole Bowls, 1.5 Cups Polished Black
description:
About this item
BUILT TO LAST - EXPERTLY CARVED from 100% NATURAL GRANITE - An authentic polished stone mortar and pestle set features beautifully in your kitchen and creates a feeling of timelessness and connection to the earth and elements. 100% natural unpolished granite resists scratches and stains and keeps its original condition for years.
UNLOCK A WORLD OF FLAVORS - Smash out healthy guacamole in minutes and enjoy the taste of the best chunky salsas, authentic chutneys, and rustic pesto. Electric food processors get the job done, but your natural, unpolished stone grinder creates the perfect friction to maximize your flavors.
SUSTAINABLE BAMBOO BASE - Experience our stone grinder bowl, perfectly balanced on a sustainable bamboo base. Beyond its natural appeal, the bamboo ensures stability, preventing toppling and safeguarding your worktop from scratches. The base detaches easily from the mortar for easy cleaning.
SIZE MATTERS - Whether it's our small pestle and mortar set catering to intimate dinners or our large mortar and pestle set fit for a feast, we've got every culinary need covered. Choose what suits your kitchen - mini or large molcajete mexicano, we have it all.
PEEL THAT GARLIC - FAST - Peeling garlic is no fun and when you start to make these delicious sauces and dips with your motor and pestle you will need a lot more! That's why we included a BPA free silicone garlic peeler with every purchase that helps to avoid the tedious task of peeling all those cloves.
reviews_5s:
The Heavy Duty Mortar and Pestle Set with Bamboo Base has become an indispensable tool in my kitchen, revolutionizing the way I prepare and enjoy herbs, spices, and seasonings. Crafted from solid granite, the mortar and pestle provide a robust and durable surface for grinding and crushing ingredients with ease. The weight and sturdiness of the set ensure stability during use, preventing slipping or sliding on countertops.

What sets this mortar and pestle apart is its versatility and efficiency. Whether I'm crushing peppercorns for a marinade or grinding fresh herbs for sauces, the textured interior of the mortar effectively releases flavors and aromas, enhancing the depth of each dish. The bamboo base not only adds a touch of elegance but also protects surfaces from scratches and provides a stable platform for the mortar.

Cleanup is straightforward; the non-porous granite surface rinses clean with minimal effort. Its natural materials and ergonomic design make it a pleasure to use, offering a tactile connection to the ingredients I work with. Overall, the Heavy Duty Mortar and Pestle Set with Bamboo Base has exceeded my expectations in both performance and aesthetics, making it an essential kitchen tool for culinary enthusiasts and home cooks alike.Good quality, very useful.My husband had been looking at these at a local cooking store. Amazon offered the same product for half the price. It's looks amazing very sturdy and easy to use.I had a mortar and pestle, and used it a lot, but when I would put the granite bowl on my granite counter top and start smashing something, the noise it made was loud. This one has a bamboo base, so it doesn't seem to turn my center island into an amplifying sound board.

It's a hefty one, but sized just right for me.Great size and weight. Substantial but not too heavy to manage. And it's great to have a wooden base to protect the counter top!It’s very easy to use and grinds everything I could possibly want.Very heavy but the bamboo insert was such a wonderful touchUsed this to grind up some stuff... a one off thing so far, but it worked and cleaned up reasonably well... no complaints.We love this mortar and pestle. It was exactly as described.Make sure u season the flavors released by using M&T are unbelievable
reviews_1s: The item arrived in its own product box (that was torn on the edges). Upon opening the top that was not even taped, I discovered the pestle was missing. I did not have a chance to use this item unfortunately.I tried to order this twice. Both times it was missing the pestle.It was missing partsMetal ones are better.This is beautiful! I love stone work, and being Italian I was a stoner from birth lol nice stable base. Excellent quality stone. For those who don't know, the darker the color of stone, the denser and stronger it is. I would be very hesitant about using any light colored stone for any food purpose as it can in this instance, grind off into food, absorb material and bacteria, break easily, etc. This is a nice dark, solid stone that looks really nice! But also has alot of white in it. The softest stone. Reason for 1 star is the machining marks in the stone, and safety as advertised use. And honestly as one who has years of granite, marble, and synthetic stone experience, I believe the inside of the mortar and the end of the pestal should be polished and sealed to avoid stone dust in your food. Rubbing my finger inside the mortar prior to use left stone dust on my finger. Obviously this will also be in whatever you grind. This should be entirely polished and sealed imo before any food or medicinal use. I fortunately have the tools n knowledge to do so, but most don't, or the knowledge obviously to know what your using. If you live in a humid climate, this will suck moisture right in. What comes with moisture? Bacteria! I do not see this being safe to use in any food or medicinal application until properly polished and sealed with natural sealers. It's not going in my body! But it is a pretty paperweight! Yes back many moons ago stone was used for this application, but knowledge then was lacking, just like peeing in a bucket and dumping it out your window. With progression in time came progression in knowledge. Seems like we are walking backwards again....didn't show up. Bought a different one, Tortillada – 16 cm Mortar and Pestle Set. it showed up and is amazing! if this one shows up I'll give it a try...The product looked beautiful for a day, after seasoning as per their instructions - My wife made garlic paste, here u go the handle broke in 2 parts, thankfully she was not hurt. Is is a waste. How can quality be so poor? Little confused looking at the reviews..
